positive: A majestic celestial owl rendered in an Art Nouveau geometric style, featuring intricate mandala elements, crescent moons, and swirling constellations forming its plumage. The central composition is highly detailed and symmetrical, creating a striking, clean silhouette against a solid background. Use linework and dot work stippling for texture, with a limited color palette of deep indigo, gold leaf accents, and cream white. Vector illustration, high contrast, perfect for apparel screen printing, highly detailed, symmetrical, ornate, epic.
